title: IT Environment Management Analyst
description:
about the company.
A prominent international financial services provider with a dynamic and inclusive corporate culture in Singapore.

about the job.
This contract opportunity focuses on overseeing technical ecosystems and release cycles within a global banking infrastructure.

  • Orchestrate the setup and maintenance of diverse testing and staging platforms to ensure seamless software delivery cycles.

  • Supervise the deployment of application builds and technical enhancements across both development and live settings.

  • Monitor system health and connectivity to guarantee data consistency and operational integrity across integrated platforms.

  • Coordinate with cross-functional global teams to manage release schedules and mitigate environment-related risks.

  • Provide comprehensive technical documentation and regular status updates to internal stakeholders regarding system availability.

skills and experience required.

  • Minimum of 6 years of experience in technical planning, configuration management, or systems environment oversight.

  • Mandatory proficiency in managing J2EE applications and application servers within Linux or Unix operating systems.

  • Practical knowledge of financial core platforms and their associated architectural connectivity.

  • Familiarity with automated deployment solutions and agile project management tracking utilities.

  • Strong analytical capabilities for diagnosing complex technical issues and implementing sustainable infrastructure solutions.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Vievien Nathan (EA: 94C3609)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
